scientific_scope: Observable adaptive value only in the disclosed two-product Program O researcher extension. No learner, Paper 2 confirmation, MFSC product-mix estimate, or Paper 3 claim is authorized.

policy_model_parameters.rule: The fitted policy retains these primary-cell parameters unchanged in adjacent-cell validation; it is not given the true sensitivity-cell parameters.

observation_contract.decision_barrier: At week t, every consumed event must have timestamp strictly less than decision_start+168*t.
allowed: product labels of requests strictly before the decision barrier
explicitly_not_used_by_v1_policy: inventory, WIP, backlog, or route state
observation_contract.reason_for_minimal_information_set: A label-only HMM policy provides the cheapest falsifiable H_obs gate and avoids double-counting tagged WIP. State-rich belief/MPC policies remain mandatory comparators before any learned-value claim.
observation_contract.same_time_rule: Pre-existing physical events at the decision timestamp are not observations for v1 because the whitelist is strictly half-open; the new action is requested at the barrier.

finite_fit_family.selection: Choose one configuration on fit tapes by maximum mean canonical ReT among configurations satisfying all mean guardrails. Break exact ties by higher quantity-visible ReT, higher worst-product fill, fewer unresolved units, policy_ids order, then lower initial action.

open_loop_denominator.definition: All base-4 length-eight calendars under the same weekly action rights and centered-minority scheduler.
open_loop_denominator.fit_static: Freeze the maximum-mean calendar on fit tapes after guardrail tie-breaking.
open_loop_denominator.primary_validation_contrast: Policy mean minus the maximum mean of all 65,536 calendars on the validation block; reselect the maximum calendar inside every paired bootstrap resample.
open_loop_denominator.randomized_mixture_note: A tape-independent convex mixture cannot exceed its best pure member in expected ReT.

primary_metric.workbook_formula_replay: 47,546 cached cells reproduced exactly when workbook Bt/Ut snapshots are injected
primary_metric.same_time_convention: repository-defined half-open request snapshot with zero-time completion/loss barrier
primary_metric.claim_limit: The formula and visible-row population are workbook-aligned. The endogenous same-time convention is a frozen researcher reconstruction, so any positive remains conditional on that explicit convention.

additional_sensitivities: union-of-generated-orders ReT with omitted rows scored zero

primary_budget.rule: All policies reserve and are charged the same fixed-clock daily freight entitlement whether a slot is loaded or empty.

resource_contract.claim_boundary: The primary resource match is equality of the reserved fixed-clock fleet envelope. If loaded departures or payload are adjudicated as purchased resources rather than service utilization, this contract does not satisfy strict actual-use non-superiority and must return STOP_RESOURCE_OR_GUARDRAIL_CONFOUND; it may not relabel them after results.

information_placebos.extra_week_delay: At week t use labels only through week t-2 and propagate the missing transition without a likelihood update.
information_placebos.cross_tape_week_shuffle: Use the request-product history from the tape 17 positions later in ascending seed order, with wraparound. The same fixed shift-17 mapping is reused unchanged on validation.
information_placebos.wrong_product_swap: Replace every observed P_C label by P_H and vice versa without changing the physical tape.
information_placebos.no_history: Use the stationary belief 0.5 at every epoch.
information_placebos.promotion_rule: Real-history rollout value must beat every label placebo with a simultaneous paired one-sided LCB95 greater than zero.

nulls.full_fungibility: Every action calendar and observable policy must be transition- and metric-identical; H_obs=0 exactly.
nulls.fixed_common_product_season: The complete open-loop frontier must match the policy/oracle up to numerical tolerance.
nulls.rho50_or_share50: Diagnostic information-null sensitivity; not a replacement primary cell.

action_trajectory_certificate.swap_counterfactual: For every non-tie audited state, swapped labels must produce action 3-a; tie states are reported separately.
action_trajectory_certificate.required: Policy must beat modal and phase-only replacements with paired LCB95>0 and beat the full frontier at the practical gate.

execution_sequence: Commit policy source, tests, contract, seed custody, command manifest, watcher, and fit-only execution freeze.
Open fit block once under whole-session VPS custody and retrieve/hash all artifacts.
Commit the selected configuration and a separate validation execution freeze.
Open validation block once under whole-session VPS custody.
Run independent checksum/custody validation and direct full-DES replay of every selected policy calendar.

validation_pass_rule.primary_and_connected_component_rule: Primary rho75_share90 and a connected component of at least three of four cells spanning both rho and share levels must have simultaneous one-sided LCB95(H_obs)>=0.01.
